settings.headline: Targeted serums for calm, clear, balanced skin.
settings.subline: Formulated with clinical-grade actives, designed for your daily ritual.

settings.label: Our Philosophy
settings.headline: Fewer ingredients. Clearer skin.
settings.body: We believe in precision over excess. Every Velour Skin formula is built around a single active concern — no filler, no compromise. Science-led, skin-first, always transparent about what goes in and why.

settings.label: Shop by Concern
settings.title: What does your skin need today?

settings.name: Simplicity
settings.description: Clean formulas, clear labels, no confusion.

settings.name: Efficacy
settings.description: Actives at proven concentrations. No aesthetic-only ingredients.

settings.name: Transparency
settings.description: Full ingredient disclosure. We explain what every component does.

settings.name: Consistency
settings.description: Results come from ritual. We design for real life, not shelf display.

settings.label: The Science
settings.title: Ingredients that earn their place
settings.subtitle: Every active is chosen for clinical evidence, not trend. Here's what's inside — and why.

settings.name: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.detail: Holds up to 1,000× its weight in water. Multi-weight formula for surface and deeper skin layers.

settings.name: Niacinamide
settings.detail: Regulates sebum, minimises pores, and fades pigmentation at 10% concentration.

settings.name: Peptides
settings.detail: Signal proteins that encourage collagen synthesis. Non-irritating age support.

settings.name: Vitamin C
settings.detail: Stabilised ascorbic acid at 15% for even tone and daily environmental defence.

settings.name: Ceramides
settings.detail: Lipids identical to those in healthy skin. Seals moisture and strengthens the skin barrier.

settings.name: Centella Asiatica
settings.detail: Madecassoside and asiaticoside reduce redness and support wound healing.

settings.name: Retinol Alternative
settings.detail: Bakuchiol — plant-derived retinol analogue. Comparable efficacy, suitable for sensitive skin.

settings.name: Green Tea
settings.detail: EGCG-rich extract neutralises free radicals and soothes inflammation.

settings.label: Routine Builder
settings.title: Not sure where to start?
settings.body: Answer four questions and we'll build your personalised serum routine — matched to your skin type and concerns.

settings.name: Seal
settings.detail: Lock in with a lightweight moisturiser

settings.headline: Your ritual, complete.
settings.body: A rich barrier cream designed to seal in everything your serum does. Ceramide-forward formula for all skin types.

settings.headline: Set, refresh, protect.
settings.body: A weightless facial spray that preps skin before serums and refreshes throughout the day.

settings.label: Designed to deliver
settings.title: Designed to support smoother, calmer, more hydrated-looking skin.
settings.disclaimer: Results vary. Formulas are designed to support skin health when used as part of a consistent routine.

settings.label: Stay in the loop
settings.title: Skin notes, routine tips, and early access.
settings.subtitle: Join the Velour Skin community. No noise, just what your skin needs.
settings.privacy_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
